mapper.select: SELECT tag_name FROM note_tag WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
SELECT DISTINCT t.tag_name FROM note_tag t JOIN note n ON t.note_id = n.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.tag_name FROM note_tag t JOIN note n ON t.note_id = n.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY t.tag_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
